chain.thought: Explanation: By comparing the viewers (m) column, the lowest value is 7.68 million, which corresponds to episode 10, "fbi guy".

judge_thought: Explanation: The viewers (in millions) per episode are: 10.82, 9.69, 8.90, 9.47, 9.70, 8.93, 8.94, 7.76, 8.58, 7.68, 8.14, 8.68, 8.46. The smallest value is 7.68 million for episode 10, "fbi guy". Therefore, "fbi guy" had the least number of viewers.
